description: Multiracial one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Primarily based in Philadelphia, with chapters in at least 25 states and Puerto Rico. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and other violent crimes. Deemed a violent gang by federal officials.

country_links.evidence_quote: in addition to a chapter in Puerto Rico
country_links.context: The Wheels of Soul has a chapter in Puerto Rico.

country_links.evidence_quote: Although they are active nationwide in the United States (in addition to a chapter in Puerto Rico), they are primarily based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania.
country_links.context: The Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club is active nationwide in the United States, with chapters in at least 25 states and a mother chapter in Philadelphia.
